channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Tools & Frameworks
channel.description: Latest Tools & Frameworks news in Context Engineering

item.title: awesome-prompt-engineering - A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.
item.description: A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> LLM, tool, prompt, paper, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
item.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> tool, context, model, API | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>

item.title: Stable Agentic Control: Tool-Mediated LLM Architecture for Autonomous Cyber Defense
item.description: arXiv:2605.03034v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Agentic systems involved in high-stake decision-making under adversarial pressure need formal guarantees not offered by existing approaches. Motivated by the operational needs of security operations centers (SOCs) that must configure endpoint detectio...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> LLM, arxiv, tool | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Connecting online criminal behavior with machine learning: Using authorship attribution to analyze and link potential online traffickers
item.description: arXiv:2605.04080v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This research investigated how online criminal activities can be better understood and connected using data-driven machine learning methods. Many illegal activities, such as human trafficking and illicit trade, have moved to online platforms where off...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> image, tool, arxiv, research, platform | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
